result.reasoning: Fill the ACROSS entries by clue and grid length:1-Across "Wooden strips on a bed frame" = SLATS (5). This also sets the first row.6-Across "_ Minhaj, Peabody-winning comedian for 'Patriot Act'" = HASAN (5).7-Across "Japanese city of 2.6+ million" = OSAKA (5).8-Across "Stopwatch, e.g." = TIMER (5).Row 5 has a black square at column 1, so 9-Across spans columns 2–5 (4 letters): "Pain in the neck" = KINK (4).These fills are consistent with the intended grid layout. Concatenate the filled characters in row-major order, skipping the black square X, to form the final string.
